title: Banana
description: Hydrate tired locks with our banana shampoo for dry hair! Made with 45% sea salt, fresh bananas, molasses and oils, it's our best product for dry, frizzy hair!
ingredients: Musa Paradisiaca Fruit (Fresh Organic Fair Trade Bananas)
Dipteryx Odorata Seed Extract (Tonka Seed Extract)
Bertholletia Excelsa Seed Oil (Organic Brazil Nut Oil)

images.alt: Banana. A smudged swatch of thick, textured shampoo. It is a rich hazelnut-brown colour with an almost treacle-like consistency and a lot of texture.

The image shows the model's arms stretched into the centre holding the white, LUSH Version-themed packed pot of the Banana shampoo. One of their hands is scooping the product out. There is a teal background.

The image shows the rear view of the model's shoulder-length hair which is wet and lathered in suds as they lather the Banana shampoo into their roots. There is a teal background with running shower water.

The image shows the rear view of the model's shoulder-length hair which is wet and lathered in suds as they lather the Banana shampoo into their roots. There is a teal background with running shower water.

The image shows the rear view of the model's shoulder-length hair which is wet and lathered in suds as they lather the Banana shampoo into their roots. There is a teal background with running shower water.
The model is on a teal background with a cream-coloured tank top. They have light brown, shoulder-length, freshly-dried hair which looks clean and healthy and is being fanned with air.
